Video.summary: In this episode, we’ll talk with several experts on the often stigmatized topic of sexual intimacy among older adults. We’ll also share information on how seniors can slow the spread of Parkinson’s disease, deal with symptoms of menopause, and reduce their risk of Alzheimer’s.
Video.title: Health Tips for Seniors

Image.alt: Health Tips for Seniors
Health Tips for Seniors
Health Tips for Seniors

Video.summary: In this episode, we’ll cover common public health issues caused by smog, pollen, and other environmental hazards. We’ll also discuss how to avoid Lyme disease, West Nile virus, and sinusitis.
Video.title: Health and the Environment

Image.alt: Health and the Environment
Health and the Environment
Health and the Environment

Video.summary: In this episode, we’ll speak with experts on how the lack of accessibility to basic healthcare has affected people around the country, as well as what steps can be taken to ensure greater health equity.
Video.title: Fighting Health Inequity

Image.alt: Fighting Health Inequity
Fighting Health Inequity
Fighting Health Inequity

Video.summary: In this episode, we’ll talk with a former cancer patient who was treated with psilocybin about his experiences, as well as a psychiatry professor who has spent decades researching the effects of medical hallucinogens.
Video.title: Drug Treatment and Therapy

Image.alt: Drug Treatment and Therapy
Drug Treatment and Therapy
Drug Treatment and Therapy

Video.summary: In this episode, we’ll be discussing the dangers of drug abuse and addiction, speaking with doctors and survivors of opioid abuse on the factors behind the recent spike in addiction across the country.
Video.title: Drug Abuse and Overdoses

Image.alt: Drug Abuse and Overdoses
Drug Abuse and Overdoses
Drug Abuse and Overdoses

Video.summary: Cynthia Kersey, with cameo appearances by David Meltzer, Blaine Bartlett, John Assaraf and emcee, Paisley Demby.
Video.title: World's Greatest Motivators - Cynthia Kersey

Image.alt: World's Greatest Motivators - Cynthia Kersey
World's Greatest Motivators - Cynthia Kersey
World's Greatest Motivators - Cynthia Kersey

Video.summary: An In-Depth interview with Hollywood Actor Haywood Nelson Talks Career and What’s Happening TV Show
Video.grandparentTitle: Pull Up The Curtain with G Souldier
Video.title: Pull Up The Curtain - Haywood Nelson

Image.alt: Pull Up The Curtain - Haywood Nelson
Pull Up The Curtain - Haywood Nelson
Pull Up The Curtain - Haywood Nelson

Video.summary: An In-Depth interview with Ethel Love. Talks 2Pac, Brenda’s Got a Baby Music Video Shoot, and Her Life
Video.grandparentTitle: Pull Up The Curtain with G Souldier
Video.title: Pull Up The Curtain - Ethel Love

Image.alt: Pull Up The Curtain - Ethel Love
Pull Up The Curtain - Ethel Love
Pull Up The Curtain - Ethel Love

Video.summary: An In-Depth interview with Eric Braeden. Talks Young and The Restless, His Career, and Legacy
Video.grandparentTitle: Pull Up The Curtain with G Souldier
Video.title: Pull Up The Curtain - Eric Braeden

Image.alt: Pull Up The Curtain - Eric Braeden
Pull Up The Curtain - Eric Braeden
Pull Up The Curtain - Eric Braeden

Video.summary: Eighteen Giants take on the first fire walk ever created on the Galapagos Islands, and tensions arise as they learn about trusting each other and themselves.
Video.title: Ecuador Part 1

Image.alt: Ecuador Part 1
Ecuador Part 1
Ecuador Part 1

Video.summary: Fears surface to reveal hidden abuse when Giants take the stage at the International University of Quito for INSPIRE Mic to empower students and staff.
Video.title: Ecuador Part 2

Image.alt: Ecuador Part 2
Ecuador Part 2
Ecuador Part 2

Video.summary: Entering the Amazon, the Giants bring clean water solutions that last ten years, and train indigenous leaders from eleven villages.
Video.title: Ecuador Part 3

Image.alt: Ecuador Part 3
Ecuador Part 3
Ecuador Part 3

Video.summary: Fifteen Giants arrive in Auckland to face their first challenge and compete in teams to with the winning team being free of all consequences of a flying leap into the unknown.
Video.title: New Zealand Part 1

Image.alt: New Zealand Part 1
New Zealand Part 1
New Zealand Part 1

Video.summary: La Dolce Vita (Sweet Life) - Ten years after the divorce from Maxwell Turner, with children grown, Celeste Wright Turner makes a choice to start living her life. No SEX with the EX! Simon and Mimi try to get Celeste’s head on straight when it comes to Maxwell’s charm. After facing an emotional challenge, Celeste decides to take a trip abroad.
Video.title: The Wright Turn: La Dolce Vita

Image.alt: The Wright Turn: La Dolce Vita
The Wright Turn: La Dolce Vita
The Wright Turn: La Dolce Vita

Video.summary: London Bridges Burning Down - Breakdowns are inevitable when Celeste tries to run from her past. Her therapist gives Celeste sound advice on how to spice up her sex life.
Video.title: The Wright Turn: London Bridges Burning Down

Image.alt: The Wright Turn: London Bridges Burning Down
The Wright Turn: London Bridges Burning Down
The Wright Turn: London Bridges Burning Down

Video.summary: Butter Me Up - Celeste returns back to Los Angeles after her journey. Her friends throw her a sex toy birthday party. When an old flame comes back, can he melt her butter? Nikki reveals a trauma from her childhood.
Video.title: The Wright Turn: Butter Me Up

Image.alt: The Wright Turn: Butter Me Up
The Wright Turn: Butter Me Up
The Wright Turn: Butter Me Up

Video.summary: Pearl Necklace - Can a long-desired gift bring Max and Celeste closer together? While Father Cross’s guilty pleasure is exposed, leaving a young family member seeking revenge and Celeste on his trail. A Fundraiser brings Maddy back to the stage with new comic material on the stage of Denim & Diamonds fundraiser for Autism Care Today.
Video.title: The Wright Turn: The Pearl Necklace

Image.alt: The Wright Turn: The Pearl Necklace
The Wright Turn: The Pearl Necklace
The Wright Turn: The Pearl Necklace

Video.summary: The team, led by Anand, prepare for their motorcycle adventure to the four sacred peaks. The first practice ride is here in the birthplace of yoga, but it is not encouraging as monsoons are destroying roads and villages, Fred seems a liability and Ryan's seizures could be an issue.
Video.title: Road to Dharma - Quantum Leaps in Rishikesh

Image.alt: Road to Dharma - Quantum Leaps in Rishikesh
Road to Dharma - Quantum Leaps in Rishikesh
Road to Dharma - Quantum Leaps in Rishikesh

Video.summary: Jen and Jeff’s dream is to save their marriage on this journey, but it’s clear they are in different mindsets from the beginning. We are reminded that Anand himself had a prophecy of death and his teachers and life adventures helped guide him to freedom. Heading towards Kedarnath, night’s darkness sets in and Ryan sees someone Flip over their handlebars…
Video.title: Road to Dharma - End of Stories - A Trechorous Night

Image.alt: Road to Dharma - End of Stories - A Trechorous Night
Road to Dharma - End of Stories - A Trechorous Night
Road to Dharma - End of Stories - A Trechorous Night

Video.summary: Our first glimpse of the first peak, Kedarnath, the temple of death. Anand reminds us that What needs to die is part of the ego, fears, and comforts. Ken thinks people are riding recklessly, Mario takes his first spill, injuring his passenger Aizhan. Jeff ‘s comments further alienate Jen, but motivate her to rise up to greatness…
Video.title: Death of Ego at Kedarnath

Image.alt: Death of Ego at Kedarnath
Death of Ego at Kedarnath
Death of Ego at Kedarnath

Video.summary: Ryan puts out prayer flags for the people who helped finance his trip, a stark contrast to the ungrateful Elle caught in blame. Warm day quickly turns cold and many are complaining about wet bedding and frigid conditions. This is Kedarnath, going beyond fickle circumstances. Ken, the newbie to spirituality isn’t so on board and his passenger Tiffany a mom with a 3 year-old, fears losing her life.
Video.title: Road to Dharma - Inner Violence Waiting to Happen

Image.alt: Road to Dharma - Inner Violence Waiting to Happen
Road to Dharma - Inner Violence Waiting to Happen
Road to Dharma - Inner Violence Waiting to Happen

Video.summary: As humans, we need interconnection: We rely on others to survive, especially as children. Yet, we also strive for authenticity. This creates an inherent tension. In this lesson, Dr. Maté discusses what is true human nature — and how the modern world has warped our understanding of our needs.
Video.title: A Return To Wholeness - Human Nature vs. Modern Culture

Image.alt: A Return To Wholeness - Human Nature vs. Modern Culture
A Return To Wholeness - Human Nature vs. Modern Culture
A Return To Wholeness - Human Nature vs. Modern Culture

Video.summary: Trauma is a wound that you sustain; it's not what happened to you. In this lesson, Dr. Maté explains why traumatic wounds get triggered and how to understand triggers in your process of transformation and healing.
Video.title: A Return To Wholeness - Approaching Trauma with Curiosity and Compassion

Image.alt: A Return To Wholeness - Approaching Trauma with Curiosity and Compassion
A Return To Wholeness - Approaching Trauma with Curiosity and Compassion
A Return To Wholeness - Approaching Trauma with Curiosity and Compassion

Video.summary: There is a strong link between childhood trauma and health challenges. Dr. Maté demonstrates how to untangle and understand this connection with self-compassion.
Video.title: A Return To Wholeness - The Connection Between Health and Childhood Trauma

Image.alt: A Return To Wholeness - The Connection Between Health and Childhood Trauma
A Return To Wholeness - The Connection Between Health and Childhood Trauma
A Return To Wholeness - The Connection Between Health and Childhood Trauma

Video.summary: Suffering has deep social causes. In this lesson, Dr. Maté explains how your physiology is impacted by stress and social determinants.
Video.title: A Return To Wholeness - The Social Roots of Suffering

Image.alt: A Return To Wholeness - The Social Roots of Suffering
A Return To Wholeness - The Social Roots of Suffering
A Return To Wholeness - The Social Roots of Suffering

Video.summary: Host Lisa Garr interviews Dr Jill Bolte Taylor, a Harvard-trained and published neuroanatomist. She shares with us the idea of cellular circuitry and how there are four distinct modules of cells that make up who we are, combining the thinking mind and the emotional side. She discusses her new book, Whole Brain Living: The Anatomy of Choice and the Four Characteristics that Drive Our Life.
Video.title: The Aware Show: Dr Jill Bolte Taylor - Whole Brain Living and Choice

Image.alt: The Aware Show: Dr Jill Bolte Taylor - Whole Brain Living and Choice
The Aware Show: Dr Jill Bolte Taylor - Whole Brain Living and Choice
The Aware Show: Dr Jill Bolte Taylor - Whole Brain Living and Choice

Video.summary: The rise of guru Bhagwan and his model commune in Poona and oregon in the 1970s & 1980s told by his former close disciples, his personal secretary and bodyguard. A spiritual journey to the depths and shallows of the human soul.
Video.title: GURU - BHAGWAN HIS SECRETARY AND HIS BODYGUARD

Image.alt: GURU - BHAGWAN HIS SECRETARY AND HIS BODYGUARD
GURU - BHAGWAN HIS SECRETARY AND HIS BODYGUARD
